name: Spicy Orange Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 Pieces dried orange peel, about 1x2 inches.
6 Pieces dried orange peel, about 1x2 inches.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into thin pieces, roughly 1 inch by 2 inches.
2. Refrigerate marinade for at least one hour, up to 8 hours.
3. Place wok over high heat until hot, pour in peanut oil, reduce heat to medium (about 350).
4. Add three pieces of the orange peel and fry briefly until it turns a darker brown, about 10 seconds.
5. Add the dried orange peel to a small amount of the seasoning sauce in a blender and puree, then add to the rest of the seasoning sauce.
6. Deep fry beef in wok over high heat (about 375).
7. Drain beef on paper towels and remove oil from wok.
8. Place wok back on high heat and add scallions, ginger, garlic, and chili peppers, stir-fry for about 30 seconds.
9. Stir in the remaining dried orange peels, then add seasoning sauce. Return the beef to the sauce and stir fry for 30 to 60 seconds.
10. Turn off heat and serve with steamed rice.
